contract.summary: 导航副本入口外部目标（支持 MapID=0 的经典旧世入口来源）

joins: areapoi ON areapoi.PoiData = journalinstance.ID AND areapoi.PoiDataType = 1
where: 入口世界坐标落在 UiMapAssignment 覆盖范围内（含 MapID=0 的全局坐标来源）
首选 UiMap 优先使用副本内部 UiMap 的父地图
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个 journalInstance 的首选外部入口目标

entrances.sql: WITH instance_maps AS (SELECT CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) AS journal_instance_id, MIN(CAST(u.UiMapID AS INTEGER)) AS instance_ui_map_id, MIN(CAST(m.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER)) AS instance_parent_ui_map_id FROM journalinstance ji JOIN uimapassignment u ON CAST(u.MapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(ji.MapID AS INTEGER) JOIN uimap m ON CAST(m.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(u.UiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(ji.MapID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(u.UiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0 GROUP BY CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER)), poi_rows AS (SELECT CAST(PoiData AS INTEGER) AS journal_instance_id, MIN(CAST(ID AS INTEGER)) AS area_poi_id, MIN(Name_lang) AS area_poi_name FROM areapoi WHERE CAST(PoiDataType AS INTEGER) = 1 AND CAST(PoiData AS INTEGER) > 0 GROUP BY CAST(PoiData AS INTEGER)), candidates AS (SELECT CAST(jie.ID AS INTEGER) AS entrance_id, CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) AS journal_instance_id, ji.Name_lang AS instance_name, CAST(ji.MapID AS INTEGER) AS instance_map_id, CAST(jie.MapID AS INTEGER) AS world_map_id, CAST(COALESCE(jie.AreaTableID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS area_table_id, CAST(COALESCE(jie.Faction, -1) AS INTEGER) AS faction, CAST(jie.Position_0 AS REAL) AS world_x, CAST(jie.Position_1 AS REAL) AS world_y, CAST(jie.Position_2 AS REAL) AS world_z, p.area_poi_id AS area_poi_id, p.area_poi_name AS area_poi_name, im.instance_ui_map_id AS instance_ui_map_id, im.instance_parent_ui_map_id AS instance_parent_ui_map_id, CAST(a.ID AS INTEGER) AS assignment_id, CAST(a.UiMapID AS INTEGER) AS target_ui_map_id, u.Name_lang AS target_ui_map_name, CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS target_ui_map_type, CAST(COALESCE(a.AreaID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS assignment_area_id, CAST(COALESCE(a.OrderIndex, 0) AS INTEGER) AS assignment_order_index, ROUND(CAST(a.UiMin_0 AS REAL) + ((CAST(jie.Position_0 AS REAL) - CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL)) / (CAST(a.Region_3 AS REAL) - CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL))) * (CAST(a.UiMax_0 AS REAL) - CAST(a.UiMin_0 AS REAL)), 6) AS target_x, ROUND(CAST(a.UiMin_1 AS REAL) + ((CAST(jie.Position_1 AS REAL) - CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL)) / (CAST(a.Region_4 AS REAL) - CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL))) * (CAST(a.UiMax_1 AS REAL) - CAST(a.UiMin_1 AS REAL)), 6) AS target_y, CASE WHEN CAST(a.UiMapID AS INTEGER) = im.instance_parent_ui_map_id THEN 0 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(a.AreaID, 0) AS INTEGER) = CAST(COALESCE(jie.AreaTableID, 0) AS INTEGER) AND CAST(COALESCE(jie.AreaTableID, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 1 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN 2 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) = 2 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS candidate_rank FROM journalinstanceentrance jie JOIN journalinstance ji ON CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN instance_maps im ON im.journal_instance_id = CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN poi_rows p ON p.journal_instance_id = CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) JOIN uimapassignment a ON CAST(a.MapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(jie.MapID AS INTEGER) JOIN uimap u ON CAST(u.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(a.UiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(jie.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(jie.MapID AS INTEGER) >= 0 AND CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL) != CAST(a.Region_3 AS REAL) AND CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL) != CAST(a.Region_4 AS REAL) AND CAST(jie.Position_0 AS REAL) BETWEEN MIN(CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL), CAST(a.Region_3 AS REAL)) AND MAX(CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL), CAST(a.Region_3 AS REAL)) AND CAST(jie.Position_1 AS REAL) BETWEEN MIN(CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL), CAST(a.Region_4 AS REAL)) AND MAX(CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL), CAST(a.Region_4 AS REAL))), ranked AS (SELECT *, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY journal_instance_id ORDER BY candidate_rank ASC, target_ui_map_type DESC, assignment_order_index ASC, target_ui_map_id ASC, assignment_id ASC) AS candidate_order FROM candidates WHERE target_x BETWEEN 0 AND 1 AND target_y BETWEEN 0 AND 1) SELECT journal_instance_id, entrance_id, instance_name, instance_map_id, world_map_id, area_table_id, faction, world_x, world_y, world_z, area_poi_id, area_poi_name, instance_ui_map_id, instance_parent_ui_map_id, assignment_id, target_ui_map_id, target_ui_map_name, target_ui_map_type, target_x, target_y, candidate_rank FROM ranked WHERE candidate_order = 1 ORDER BY journal_instance_id

where: 入口世界坐标命中 UiMapAssignment（含 MapID=0 的全局坐标来源）
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个首选副本入口外部目标

candidates.sql: WITH instance_maps AS (SELECT CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) AS journal_instance_id, MIN(CAST(u.UiMapID AS INTEGER)) AS instance_ui_map_id, MIN(CAST(m.ParentUiMapID AS INTEGER)) AS instance_parent_ui_map_id FROM journalinstance ji JOIN uimapassignment u ON CAST(u.MapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(ji.MapID AS INTEGER) JOIN uimap m ON CAST(m.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(u.UiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(ji.MapID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(u.UiMapID AS INTEGER) > 0 GROUP BY CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER)), candidates AS (SELECT CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) AS journal_instance_id, CAST(jie.ID AS INTEGER) AS entrance_id, im.instance_parent_ui_map_id AS instance_parent_ui_map_id, CAST(a.ID AS INTEGER) AS assignment_id, CAST(a.UiMapID AS INTEGER) AS target_ui_map_id, u.Name_lang AS target_ui_map_name, CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) AS target_ui_map_type, CAST(COALESCE(a.AreaID, 0) AS INTEGER) AS assignment_area_id, ROUND(CAST(a.UiMin_0 AS REAL) + ((CAST(jie.Position_0 AS REAL) - CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL)) / (CAST(a.Region_3 AS REAL) - CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL))) * (CAST(a.UiMax_0 AS REAL) - CAST(a.UiMin_0 AS REAL)), 6) AS target_x, ROUND(CAST(a.UiMin_1 AS REAL) + ((CAST(jie.Position_1 AS REAL) - CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL)) / (CAST(a.Region_4 AS REAL) - CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL))) * (CAST(a.UiMax_1 AS REAL) - CAST(a.UiMin_1 AS REAL)), 6) AS target_y, CASE WHEN CAST(a.UiMapID AS INTEGER) = im.instance_parent_ui_map_id THEN 0 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(a.AreaID, 0) AS INTEGER) = CAST(COALESCE(jie.AreaTableID, 0) AS INTEGER) AND CAST(COALESCE(jie.AreaTableID, 0) AS INTEGER) > 0 THEN 1 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) = 3 THEN 2 WHEN CAST(COALESCE(u.Type, 0) AS INTEGER) = 2 THEN 3 ELSE 4 END AS candidate_rank FROM journalinstanceentrance jie JOIN journalinstance ji ON CAST(ji.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) LEFT JOIN instance_maps im ON im.journal_instance_id = CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) JOIN uimapassignment a ON CAST(a.MapID AS INTEGER) = CAST(jie.MapID AS INTEGER) JOIN uimap u ON CAST(u.ID AS INTEGER) = CAST(a.UiMapID AS INTEGER) WHERE CAST(jie.ID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(jie.JournalInstanceID AS INTEGER) > 0 AND CAST(jie.MapID AS INTEGER) >= 0 AND CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL) != CAST(a.Region_3 AS REAL) AND CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL) != CAST(a.Region_4 AS REAL) AND CAST(jie.Position_0 AS REAL) BETWEEN MIN(CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL), CAST(a.Region_3 AS REAL)) AND MAX(CAST(a.Region_0 AS REAL), CAST(a.Region_3 AS REAL)) AND CAST(jie.Position_1 AS REAL) BETWEEN MIN(CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL), CAST(a.Region_4 AS REAL)) AND MAX(CAST(a.Region_1 AS REAL), CAST(a.Region_4 AS REAL))) SELECT journal_instance_id, entrance_id, assignment_id, target_ui_map_id, target_ui_map_name, target_ui_map_type, assignment_area_id, target_x, target_y, candidate_rank FROM candidates WHERE target_x BETWEEN 0 AND 1 AND target_y BETWEEN 0 AND 1 ORDER BY journal_instance_id, candidate_rank, target_ui_map_type DESC, target_ui_map_id, assignment_id

where: 入口世界坐标命中 UiMapAssignment
query.row_granularity: 一行代表一个副本入口外部 UiMap 候选

structure.lua_shape: Toolbox.Data.NavigationInstanceEntrances = { schemaVersion, sourceMode, generatedAt, entrancesByJournalInstanceID, candidatesByJournalInstanceID }

change_log.summary: 初始契约版本，导出副本入口外部 UiMap 目标；首选规则优先使用副本内部 UiMap 的父地图
允许 journalinstanceentrance.MapID = 0 的全局坐标来源参与目标推导，覆盖斯坦索姆等经典旧世共享入口
